description: Canonical entity model for the fuzzy-match ER reference pipeline. Decoupled input: this is the kind of artifact any data-modeling tool or session produces (domains -> products -> attributes); the pipeline only depends on its shape, not on how it was authored.

products.description: A manufacturer part (electronic component) tracked across ERP, PLM, and procurement source systems and resolved to a single golden entity in gold.entities.

attributes.description: Manufacturer part number as published by the source system, unnormalized.
Commodity/category classification, e.g. op-amps, regulators, PMTs, ADCs, connectors, MOSFETs, caps.
Part lifecycle state, e.g. active, nrnd, obsolete. Sources may disagree; resolved by survivorship rules in U6.
Free-text technical specification summary used for functional-equivalent matching.
